Comment.value: This script is called by Clone IO Value
Not complete yet!!!!! No loop for IO Value conditition No loop for IO Value SortOrder Not tested!

SetProperty ( "isClonedTitle" ; $isClonedTitle ) & SetProperty ( "isMovedPackage" ; $isMovedPackage ) & SetProperty ( "clone_level" ; $clone_level ) & SetProperty ( "clone_settings" ; $clone_settings ) & SetProperty ( "suffix" ; $suffix ) & SetProperty ( "title_id" ; $title_id ) & SetProperty ( "old_io_value_id" ; $old_io_value_id ) & SetProperty ( "new_io_value_id" ; $io_value_id ) & SetProperty ( "io_id" ; $io_id )
Check if this will interfere with compound id using Field id and IO value id
Point to the input field value created earlier in Make an empty copy

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Field Value::IO Field id

Comment.value: Point to the input field value created earlier in Make an empty copy

Calculation.Text: FAT IO Sort Order::IO Field id

Comment.value: Point to the input field value created earlier when creating the new IO
